name: Classic Domed Saucer
description: The canonical flying saucer: an oblate lens body with a capsule dome on top, polished aluminum or chrome surface, segmented rim with rotating lights, and occasional porthole windows around the equator. The 3:1 diameter-to-height ratio is standard. This is the kitsch archetype — the bumper sticker, the patch, the Halloween costume. For generative work, this is the richest geometry: dome, rim segments, porthole array, underside detail, and landing gear provide infinite parameterization.

ir_signature.ir_notes: Classic saucer predates IR sensor footage. Not modeled for FLIR. Day/dusk photographic appearance only.

cultural_context: The pop-culture ur-saucer. Every alien emoji, every bumper sticker, every rave flyer. Also the canonical little_green_men vehicle — see merrypranxter/little_green_men for the character that pilots it. The saucer_dance.js sketch in this repo is the crossover moment.
